title: Basic JavaScript Cache API
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Cache API. Focus on implementing CacheStorage object correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Cache API
description: Create a function that uses CacheStorage object and caches.open() together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Cache API Project
description: Build a small application that applies CacheStorage object, caches.open(), Adding to cache (add, addAll, put) in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Cache API
description: The following code has bugs related to CacheStorage object. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Cache API
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with CacheStorage object and caches.open().
